title: dryopteris erythrosora var. koidzumiana
intro: Dryopteris erythrosora var. koidzumiana, also known as autumn fern, is a variety of the autumn fern plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. The autumn fern is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant's extracts have been used to treat various health conditions, including high blood pressure, fever, and digestive issues, offering health benefits such as improved circulation and boosted immune system. The autumn fern can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine, particularly in Asian cultures.
